---
title: "Sign our petitions!"
format: html
---

Sign the following petitions to support night trains in Austria and Europe :


- No to the Strasbourg-Munich airline, yes to the night train: [https://agir.greenvoice.fr/petitions/strasbourg](https://agir.greenvoice.fr/petitions/strasbourg)   
See the [German translation](https://ouiautraindenuit.wordpress.com/petition_strasbourg_de/).

- Save the night trains Vienna-Paris and Berlin-Paris: [https://agir.greenvoice.fr/p/berlin](https://agir.greenvoice.fr/p/berlin)   
See the [English](https://ouiautraindenuit.wordpress.com/petition-sauvons-les-trains-de-nuit-paris-berlin-et-paris-vienne-2/#en) and [German translation](https://ouiautraindenuit.wordpress.com/petition-sauvons-les-trains-de-nuit-paris-berlin-et-paris-vienne-2/#de)



- Save the night train Basel-Malmö: [https://act.campax.org/petitions/unterstutze-uns-den-nachtzug-nach-malmo-zu-retten](https://act.campax.org/petitions/unterstutze-uns-den-nachtzug-nach-malmo-zu-retten)
